name: Indian Rice Pudding (India)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the rice about three times.
2. Pour the milk into a thick-bottomed saucepan and bring to a boil.
3. Add the rice to the boiling milk and stir constantly.
4. Reduce the mixture to half its volume on a very low flame, stirring continuously.
5. When the rice is nearly cooked, add the currents.
6. Continue cooking until the rice is fully done.
7. Add sugar and then the flavors (saffron and cardamom).
8. Stir for about an hour. The effort is worth the delicious result!
